name: Operations and Invoice Details
query:
select 
  `tabOperations`.name as "Operations:Link/Operations:220",
  `tabOperations`.date as "Operations Date:Date:120",
  `tabSales Invoice`.name as "Sales Invoice:Link/Sales Invoice:300",
  `tabSales Invoice`.posting_date as "Sales Invoice Date:Date:180"
FROM  
    `tabOperations`
    LEFT JOIN `tabSales Invoice` ON (`tabSales Invoice`.operations = `tabOperations`.name)
 
WHERE
    `tabOperations`.docstatus=0
